     the Fermi energy is    -1.1642 ev

!    total energy              =  -14482.56359034 Ry
     estimated scf accuracy    <          2.3E-09 Ry
     smearing contrib. (-TS)   =      -0.20010144 Ry
     internal energy E=F+TS    =  -14482.36348890 Ry

     The total energy is F=E-TS. E is the sum of the following terms:
     one-electron contribution = -316450.34570725 Ry
     hartree contribution      =  159639.50740367 Ry
     xc contribution           =   -6011.57644852 Ry
     ewald contribution        =  148342.83021235 Ry
     DFT-D3 Dispersion         =      -2.77894914 Ry

     absolute magnetization    =   107.80 Bohr mag/cell
